title: Nickname
description: A Simple Sit and Nick Plugin For Minecraft.
body: Scnickeo is a plugin with nickname customization . Players can use /nick <player> <nickname> [skin]  to change their display name with color support.A Simple , Safe And Secure Minecraft Plugin For Players.Its Light For Servers To Use It.Skin Feature Allows You To Put Any Premium Player's Skin.And New Update Has /sit /lay /crawl Integrated With The Plugin.New Versions Has TreeAssist For More Help.Its Light-Weight Around 20kb.
